name: Spoken English Mastery (Advance Level)
description:
90 din mein achhi English bolne ki taiyaari — bilkul basic se lekar advanced level tak. Grammar ke rules mein uljhe bina, aasani se har baat English mein bolna seekhein.

【 Is course mein aap kya seekhenge 】
• Bilkul basic se lekar advanced level tak poori training
• English words bolne ka sahi tarika (pronunciation & flow)
• Sentences banana — bina grammar rules mein uljhe
• Do, Does, Has, Have, Had jaise topics aasani se
• Apni introduction English mein kaise dein
• English mein sawal aur jawab (Q&A)
• Request, order, invitation, salaah dena — sahi words ke saath
• Kisi se kaam karwane wali baat kaise bolein
• Could, Would, Should jaise words ka sahi use
• Bolte waqt common mistakes kaise theek karein
• English bolne ka confidence kaise laayein
• If wale conditional sentences kaise banayein aur bolein
• Advanced: Tenses, Active–Passive Voice, Narration, Causative verbs — bina uljhaav ke, roz-marra mein istemaal

【 Kaise padhaaya jaata hai 】
Saare concepts mazedaar tareeke se Odia aur Hindi mein samjhaaye jaate hain — kisi bhi umar par Hindi se English seekh sakte ho, hamaare style se.

name: Artificial Intelligent Associate (AI Dev with Python)
+2 IT Arts/Science/OAV
description: One-year academic support course aligned with school curriculum for +2 Arts/Science/OAV learners. Includes fundamentals of IT, office productivity tools, internet and digital safety, project-based practicals, chapter-wise revision, previous-year question practice, and exam preparation support.

name: OAV - ICT 6th-10th
description: One-year ICT foundation program mapped to OAV school curriculum for classes 6th to 10th. Covers digital literacy, typing basics, MS Office, internet research, coding fundamentals, safe technology use, practical lab activities, and class-wise test and assessment support.
